title: ヒシアマ姐さんの山菜採り

text_block_list.text:
One day, while passing by the fields at the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm, there aren't any here either...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey Teach! Sorry to spring this on you, but do
you know anything about wild vegetables?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, one of my dorm residents is feelin'
homesick, so I thought I'd cheer her up by making
her a dish from her hometown.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Except I can't find the necessary veggies
anywhere. I checked a whole bunch of grocers
and supermarkets, but it was no good.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And then it hit me—I should just forage for them
in the mountains myself! Come and help me out,
Teach!

We head out of town to look for the vegetables
in question, but we still don't manage to find any.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they grow closer to the mountain? Let's
take a look!
We make our ascent up the trail, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hold up—there's a fallen tree blocking our path!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll get this twig out of the way, no problem! Stay
back, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Grrr... Hi-yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe we'll find somethin' if we head down some
animal trails. Let's go! I'll clear out a path for us,
so don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Follow my lead! Graaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they grow at a higher elevation. Let's try
climbing that cliff!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yaaaah! Behold the fruits of my daily training!

Hishi Amazon scales the cliff like it's nothing with
her rock climbing skills...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Took us long enough!

At last, we find the wild vegetables just as the sun
is setting.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for taggin' along, Teach! I couldn't have
done it without you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, that's her—the student I was telling you
about who's feelin' homesick.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Hishiama...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Guess what! I'm puttin' your hometown dishes on
the breakfast menu tomorrow, so hang in there,
all right?

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: What? Wait, did you forage all of those yourself?

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
But they only grow way up in the mountains! I
can't believe you'd do all that for me...
choice_data_list:
They don't call her the best cook in Miho
Dormitory for nothing.

They don't call her the best cook in Miho
Dormitory for nothing.
We tried our best to find them before sunset.
We tried our best to find them before sunset.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
But they only grow way up in the mountains! I
can't believe you'd do all that for me...
choice_data_list:
They don't call her the best cook in Miho
Dormitory for nothing.

They don't call her the best cook in Miho
Dormitory for nothing.
We tried our best to find them before sunset.
We tried our best to find them before sunset.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I doubt I could beat her mom's cooking,
though.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But that's not gonna stop me from trying! I'm
gonna rock your taste buds!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Oh, Hishiama... Sniff... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, don't start with the waterworks! I'm
tryin' to cheer you up here!

The following morning, Hishi Amazon manages to
cure her dorm resident's homesickness with her
homemade meal.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh! It was nothing for the leader of Miho Dorm!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's no mountain too high to climb or wild
vegetable too obscure to find! I'll do anything
and everything for my dorm residents!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
In fact, it doubled as a pretty good hike! Right,
Teach?

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Thank you... both of you! Sniff! Thank you, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ack, don't cry now! I did this to cheer you up,
remember?

The following morning, the dorm resident in
question is feeling much better and helps herself
to seconds and thirds of the dish Hishi Amazon
makes.
